creator: gerrit.beine@gmx.de
text:
Am Samstag, 5. Januar 2008 03:30:05 schrieb Edwin Groothuis:
> Maintainer of www/trac-tocmacro,
>
> Please note that PR ports/119349 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/119349

This patch will use a newer source package checked out from trac-hacks.org 
repository.
